name: WebDAV ScStoragePathFromUrl buffer overflow
description: Buffer overflow in the ScStoragePathFromUrl function in WebDAV service in IIS 6.0 allows remote code execution via a crafted PROPFIND request.
recommendation: Upgrade from IIS 6.0. Apply Microsoft security update.

name: HTTP.sys Remote Code Execution (MS15-034)
description: HTTP.sys in IIS allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted HTTP Range header, affecting Windows 7/8/Server 2008R2/2012R2.

name: HTTP Protocol Stack RCE
description: HTTP Protocol Stack use-after-free vulnerability allows unauthenticated remote code execution. Wormable — can propagate without user interaction.
recommendation: Apply Microsoft security update for May 2021.

name: HTTP.sys Remote Code Execution
description: HTTP Protocol Stack remote code execution vulnerability in Windows HTTP.sys. Wormable when HTTP trailer support is enabled.

name: HTTP/2 Rapid Reset DDoS
description: The HTTP/2 protocol allows denial of service via rapid stream creation and cancellation, overwhelming server resources.
recommendation: Apply October 2023 Microsoft security updates. Configure HTTP/2 stream limits.

name: IP Security Feature Bypass
description: IIS 8.0/8.5 improperly validates IP address restrictions, potentially allowing restricted clients to access resources.

name: IIS Tampering Vulnerability
description: An improper validation vulnerability in IIS allows an attacker to modify server variables, potentially bypassing security controls.

name: Azure App Service / IIS Remote Code Execution
description: An elevation of privilege vulnerability in Azure App Service on Azure Stack allows remote code execution as SYSTEM from a sandboxed IIS process.

name: FTP Service Heap-Based Buffer Overflow
description: Heap-based buffer overflow in the FTP service in IIS 7.0 and 7.5 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted FTP command.

name: IIS Information Disclosure
description: IIS 7.5 allows remote attackers to obtain sensitive directory information via a crafted request.

name: FTP Command Injection
description: The FTP service in IIS allows remote attackers to inject FTP commands via crafted negotiation, potentially executing commands on the server.

name: Windows Server Information Disclosure via IIS
description: An information disclosure vulnerability exists when the Windows Server DHCP service leaks memory during certain IIS request processing.

name: ASP.NET Request Validation Bypass via IIS
description: IIS does not properly handle certain HTTP requests processed by ASP.NET, which can lead to denial of service.

name: IIS Elevation of Privilege
description: A privilege escalation vulnerability in the way IIS processes certain requests allows local attackers to gain SYSTEM privileges.

name: Microsoft Exchange ProxyShell via IIS
description: Exchange Server arbitrary file write vulnerability exploitable through the IIS frontend, part of the ProxyShell exploit chain.
recommendation: Apply Microsoft May 2021 Exchange cumulative updates.
